creator: sterling@camdensoftware.com
text:
pcpustat fails on some systems with memory allocation error.

Fix: Allocate memory for maximum supported CPUs, rather than the number of physical CPUs.  shar file follows:
How-To-Repeat: 	Running pcpustat without arguments generated the error:
	pcpustat: sysctl(kern.cp_times...) failed: Cannot allocate memory
